middle_blurb: AI Integrators is building a real community in Skool, in the Philippines, and around the world for people who want to work remotely and deliver real business outcomes. These graduates put in the time, effort, and reps to get certified and prove they can execute at a very high level. They are trained, coached, and supported to plug into businesses as AI integrators who handle day-to-day implementation and building work, not just strategy talk.
case_studies: Implementing AI workflows across the business.
Automating high-level content marketing systems using proven swipe-file frameworks.
Organizing operations into one central heartbeat and automating the flow of work.
Outsourcing and automating recruiting so hiring no longer blocks growth.
Building apps, launching new divisions, and standing up new business capabilities.
Helping every role in the business integrate AI while AI handles more of the heavy lifting.
closing_blurb: If you are running a business, launching an app, leading a team, coaching, consulting, or building anything important, you need an AI integrator. Trying to do everything yourself is how businesses fall behind. If this person in this post, or another graduate, looks like a fit, reach out and we will match you with the right operator. We provide ongoing coaching and technical management, so technical escalation comes to us, not your team. Graduates can send us Loom videos anytime and get one-on-one support.
